general_inquiry.question: Find all real solutions to $\frac{\log \left(x+\frac{21}{2}\right)}{\log (2)}+\frac{\log (23-10 x)}{\log (2)}=\frac{\log \left(\frac{35 x}{2}-6\right)}{\log (2)}$ Do not show work just give me the final answer!!!
general_inquiry.response: The real solution to the equation \(\frac{\log \left(x+\frac{21}{2}\right)}{\log (2)}+\frac{\log (23-10 x)}{\log (2)}=\frac{\log \left(\frac{35 x}{2}-6\right)}{\log (2)}\) is \(x = \frac{3}{5}\).
